reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.2 , reason:  Error: Should loop over pointnum (0 to pointnum-1) to remove all edges of deleted vertex, not linenum (number of edges).
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.2 , reason:  This loop incorrectly iterates up to linenum using index i to access vertices, which does not correctly remove all edges connected to vertex m. It should iterate through all possible vertices (0 to pointnum-1) to set line[i][m] and line[m][i] to 0.
